title: Painting Variant Sprites
description: A resource pack that gives distinguishable sprites in the vanilla style to all vanilla painting variants.
body:
This resource pack gives all vanilla paintings unique sprites to make them distinguishable from each other in the creative inventory. The sprites take on the default vanilla painting sprite shape to more reflect the vanilla look.

![Display of all vanilla painting sprites](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mqKK2QVg/images/cd294cc7b095719cd6bda94067e8a887463ba290.png)

First showcased in slicedlime's technical updates video for 25w04a
